capabilities.helpWanted: Is this capability's DMX range really wider than the others?

gwSpecs.description:
The BT-LEDROTOR is a high power 70x70cm LED-effect-fan for TV-Studios, Rental, …
Each of the 6 fan blades is equipped with 5 sections of RGB-leds that you can control individually.
An additional ring of UV LEDs was added to create extra effects.
